headline: Is DTE Energy Company (DTE) a High Growth Utility Stock to Buy on Data Center’s Opportunities?
summary: DTE Energy Company (NYSE:DTE) is one of the high growth utility stocks to buy according to analysts. On May 5, analysts at Jefferies reiterated a Buy rating on DTE Energy Co (NYSE:DTE) but cut the price target to $168 from $170. The research firm insists the stock is a buy given the data center deals […]

headline: Barclays Lowers its Price Target on DTE Energy (DTE)
summary: DTE Energy Company (NYSE:DTE) is one of the 15 Best Power Generation Stocks To Buy For Data Center Demand. On May 4, 2026, Barclays lowered its price target on DTE Energy Company (NYSE:DTE) to $154 from $156 and maintained an Equal Weight rating following the company’s Q1 report.
